news.title: ASX slides as war uncertainty lingers; Oil stocks rise, Temple & Webster slumps
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket extended its losses on Thursday as uncertainty over the Iran war hangs over investors and the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz drove oil prices higher.

news.title: ASX set to slide as Wall Street stutters, oil climbs; Meta cuts 8000 jobs; Warner Bros shareholders approve $US110b Paramount deal
news.snippet: US stocks are pulling back from their record heights on a shaky Wall Street.

news.title: Major bank lifts rates twice in 3 weeks
news.snippet: A big four bank has hiked interest rates for the second time in three weeks as mortgage holders brace for a critical Reserve Bank meeting.

news.title: Don’t let gas giants scare you - they need to cough up
news.snippet: There’s something better than a 25 per cent tax on gas exports. It involves us all having some skin in the gas game.

news.title: California Club, Melbourne’s biggest brothel, is for sale
news.snippet: It’s only the second time in more than 40 years that the brothel – now a designated sex service premises – has gone on the market.

news.title: The advice Mackenzie Arnold gave her heir apparent, Chloe Lincoln
Rinehart to hand over financial records to court rivals
news.snippet: The WA Supreme Court judge who handed down the ruling in the case may not be available to oversee the ultimate decision of the royalties involved.

news.title: ‘Bad choice’: Retail pioneer’s emotional post after Click Frenzy collapse
news.snippet: The founder of Australia’s pioneering online retail sales event says he is “shattered” and “embarrassed” after the company’s shock collapse.

news.title: New detail in Aussie fuel crisis
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese has revealed a key detail in Australia’s fuel supply as a tense ceasefire holds in the Middle East.

news.title: Fresh twist in Rinehart royalties case
news.snippet: Gina Rinehart could be made to hand over years of financial records, after a court ruled a rival mining dynasty is owed hundreds of millions in unpaid royalties.

news.title: China’s genius move shows up Australia
news.snippet: Beijing now controls the supply chains of a massive list of crucial minerals. And now we know it is absolutely willing to exploit them.

news.title: ‘Rents starting to grow’: Bars and restaurants fill city as shop vacancies plummet
news.snippet: A surge in restaurant and bar openings has filled nearly half of the city’s retail space.
